sources.title: [Interview] Framing Space Through the Human Experience: Michael Najjar x Samsung Art Store
sources.excerpt: Michael Najjar is a German artist and explorer whose work moves between the terrestrial and the cosmic, blending photography, digital construction and speculative vision. A future Virgin Galactic astronaut expected to fly aboard Virgin Spaceship Unity (VSS Unity) in 2027, he is set to become the first contemporary artist to travel into space. Najjar’s work charts a world shaped by technology, infrastructure and human ambition. Through his lens, space becomes both a visual subject and a tangible

sources.title: [Interview] Beyond the Shot: How the APV Codec Powers the Full Mobile Video Experience on Galaxy S26 Ultra
sources.excerpt: We’re living in an era where anyone can be a creator. As mobile phones make it effortless to capture high-quality video, what was once for professionals has become part of everyday life. Samsung Electronics has independently developed the APV (Advanced Professional Video) codec, a technology designed to enable high-quality video editing and has released it as open source. The codec made its debut on Galaxy S26 Ultra launched in March, setting a new benchmark for mobile video creation. By preserv
